# https://metanetsoft.com/llms.txt

Metanetsoft is a technical consultancy focused on AI, web engineering, mobile applications, scalable architecture, and digital transformation.

## Services

- AI and Intelligent Automation: Custom LLM fine-tuning, predictive logic engines, computer vision
- Web Design, Engineering, and SEO: Modern UI/UX design, React/Next.js engineering, technical SEO and performance optimization
- Mobile Application Development: Native and cross-platform mobile experiences, Swift/Kotlin expertise, real-time biometric synchronization
- Cloud Infrastructure Scalability: Elastic architectures handling millions of requests per second
- Enterprise Digital Transformation: End-to-end software ecosystem modernization

## Supported Languages (30 locales)

English, Spanish, German, French, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Portuguese (Brazil), Korean, Arabic, Russian, Italian, Indonesian, Hindi, Urdu, Turkish, Vietnamese, Polish, Dutch, Romanian, Czech, Swedish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Thai, Bengali, Persian, Filipino, Malay, Greek

## Contact

Website: https://metanetsoft.com
Email: contact@metanetsoft.com

## Organization

Metanetsoft is a high-performance technical consultancy specializing in AI architecture optimization, cloud infrastructure scalability, and enterprise digital transformation.
